final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing e-commerce landing page hero section mockup for a skincare brand named "LUMEA BEAUTY".

Style/medium: needs a clean, bright, airy, feminine aesthetic with floral accents — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a full-width landing page layout with: header nav bar at top / three-column hero section (left copy column, center model, right product column) / horizontal benefit cards row at bottom
Subject: must include all elements across sections:
  Header: logo wordmark "LUMEA BEAUTY" (left), 5 nav links (center), CTA button (right)
  Hero left: headline text, subheadline, 3 pill-shaped feature badges with small icons, 3 bullet points with pink checkmarks, 2 CTA buttons, trust badge line
  Hero center: young East Asian woman smiling, touching her cheek, holding a dropper bottle of serum
  Hero right: moisturizing boost serum dropper bottle + packaging box (2 items), 3 floating stat cards
  Bottom: 3 horizontal white rounded-rectangle benefit cards with icons
Scene/backdrop: needs a soft, airy indoor or studio backdrop with purple floral accent elements — exact placement is yours
Lighting/mood: needs soft, diffused, flattering lighting — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: must be soft pink and white dominant, with purple flower accents and gold accent details on stat cards
Materials/textures: needs soft, smooth surface treatment — exact sheen and texture weight is yours
Text (verbatim): must include all text exactly as listed:
  Header nav: "特徴" / "成分" / "お客様の声" / "使い方" / "FAQ"
  Header CTA button: "今すぐ試す"
  Headline: "鏡を見るたび、うるおう透明感。"
  Subheadline: "乾燥・くすみが気になる肌に。美容成分を贅沢に配合した、毎日のための集中保湿美容液。"
  Feature badges: "敏感肌OK" / "高保湿" / "朝晩使える"
  Bullet points: "美容成分をしっかり届ける" / "ハリ・ツヤのある印象へ" / "続けやすいシンプルケア"
  CTA buttons: "初回限定で試してみる >" / "成分をチェック >"
  Trust badges: "送料無料 / 初回限定 / 定期縛りなし"
  Stat cards: "満足度 96%" / "美容成分 5種配合" / "愛用者 12,000人突破"
  Benefit cards: "うるおい" / "透明感" / "使いやすさ"
  Logo: "LUMEA BEAUTY"
Constraints: must preserve all three hero columns clearly separated; stat cards must be floating white rounded rectangles with gold accents; benefit cards must be horizontal white rounded rectangles with icons; feature badges must be pill-shaped; bullet points must use pink checkmark style
Avoid:
